text:
group the channels it's on by workspace (in case the agent is in channels of multiple workspaces) [...] ❯ ● @nova-codex   tenex-edge: #ideas #skills-work · skills: #skill-dev   2m
    Session title — current activity
```

Where:

- `●` is the color-only state badge—no `working`, `idle`, or `PTY` text.
- Each workspace name has a deterministic color derived from its canonical workspace ID.
- Channels are grouped as `workspace: #channel #channel`. [...] I would display active and passively joined channels equally for now, avoiding another marker or label.
